description: Routing evals for kiln-forge SKILL.md intent detection. Each test case should trigger the correct workflow dispatch.

evals.input: The codex agent's prompt skeleton isn't being followed — GPT-5.4 ignores the section headers. Can you fix the codex.md to enforce it structurally?
evals.expected_behavior: Reads plugin-architecture.md, reads codex.md, checks evolution-log for prior changes, proposes structural fix, implements after approval

evals.input: Run a full structural check on the plugin — I want to make sure everything is consistent after the last round of changes.
evals.expected_behavior: Runs all 6 validation checks, reports results table with PASS/WARN/FAIL per check

evals.input: Run the S5 build cycle scenario to see if the krs-one changes work.
evals.expected_behavior: Selects S5, prepares workspace from seed, launches pipeline, collects results, reports metrics

evals.input: Show me the metrics trend for build cycle tests — are we getting faster?
evals.expected_behavior: Reads run-history.json, filters for S5/build scenarios, displays trend table with direction indicators

evals.input: Why did the codex prompt have 0 out of 6 skeleton sections in ST11.5? The fix was already in the code.
evals.expected_behavior: Gathers evidence from run-history, evolution-log, TWEAKS.md, traces causal chain to root cause (instruction vs structural enforcement)

evals.input: What's the current state of the plugin? How many agents, last test result, open findings?
evals.expected_behavior: Reads plugin-state.json, supplements with live file counts, shows formatted status dashboard
